descriptionHtml:
Dufour 48 For Sale 2020 | 5 Guest Cabins + 1 Crew Cabin | Tax Not Paid

 

If you are searching for a spacious and well-maintained catamaran, the Dufour 48 For Sale 2020 stands as a strong candidate. Available for sale at the end of the 2025 season, this yacht has been kept in good condition by her current owner and is ready to offer comfort and versatility for both private cruising or charter operations.

Key Specifications - Dufour 48 For Sale 2020

  • Year of Build: 2020
  • Length Overall (LOA): 14.70 m
  • Beam: 8.00 m
  • Draft: 1.30 m
  • Cabins: 6 (4 double cabins with en-suites, 1 bunk bed cabin with en-suite, 1 single crew cabin)
  • Heads: 5
  • Engines: Volvo Penta 2x60 hp, sail drive, approx. 1,500 hours
  • Fuel Capacity: 900 litres
  • Water Capacity: 690 litres
  • Main Sail: Battened
  • Steering Wheel(s): 1
  • Generator: Onan 11 KWA
  • Air Conditioning: Yes
  • Navigation: Full Raymarine suite (GPS-Plotter, Autopilot)
  • Solar Panels: Yes
  • Electric Windlass: Yes
  • Deck Shower: Hot and cold
  • Dinghy with Outboard: Included
  • Sound System: Advanced MS Fusion stereo, cockpit speakers
  • Bimini: Yes
  • Electric Fridge: Yes

Overall, the Dufour 48 For Sale 2020 is a practical and comfortable catamaran with all the necessary features. She is now available for new adventures at the conclusion of the 2025 sailing season. Please enquire for viewings or further details.
